title: APM: Octo Demo Request and Error Timeline
description: Timeline of octo-apm-demo application events by severity, suitable for spotting bursts of warnings, errors, and normal request flow.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Service Name' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'APM Domain' = 'octo-apm-demo') | timestats span = 5minute count as Events by 'Severity Level'

ask_ai_prompts: Explain the octo-apm-demo request and error timeline.
Identify whether error events align with request bursts.
